pi_items.source: Visual grounding analysis of official evidence screenshot (route_planning_settings.png) showing the Route planning & Navigation settings screen from Sygic GPS Navigation app; confirmed by web documentation from manula.com showing official Sygic terminology

Visual inspection of route_planning_settings.png showing toggle switch states; corroborated by web search results on Sygic GPS documentation confirming that enabling route avoidance options means toggling them ON

privileged_info_summary: The avoid_ferries task requires enabling the "Avoid ferries" option in Sygic GPS Navigation's Route Planning settings. The actual UI label is "Avoid ferries" (not just "Ferries"). The expected state is ON (enabled), represented by a blue toggle switch. The task operates on the real Sygic GPS Navigation app (package: com.sygic.aura) running on an Android emulator, not synthetic data.
